title: Quartz Bricks: Reloaded
description: Improves quartz brick textures with better tiling patterns and brighter mortar lines.
body:
# Quartz Bricks: Reloaded
*Refines quartz brick textures with enhanced tiling aesthetics and brightened mortar lines for a more authentic quartz appearance.*

## Features
  - Redesigned quartz brick pattern for seamless tiling across large surfaces
  - Brightened mortar lines to emphasize the natural quartz aesthetic

## Installation
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place the .zip file directly in your resource packs folder
3. Activate in-game and enjoy!
